credits.label: Credits
credits.blocked: AI requests are paused — the pool is below 20. Earn more by sharing or wait for the next vote grant.

landing.tagline: Turn your idea into a CyOps-ready prompt.

scoring.title: Scoring
scoring.intro: AI judges score projects against these 6 dimensions. Combined with community votes for final ranking.

ideas.title: Generate Your Idea
ideas.subtitle: Quick AI generation or guided brainstorming — choose your path.
ideas.quickGenDesc: AI analyzes trends + hackathon requirements to create a complete project idea in one shot.
ideas.chatQuizDesc: Guided brainstorming with the AI — answer questions to refine your project design step by step.

voteForMe.title: Vote for Us
voteForMe.subtitle: Each vote adds +100 credits to the shared AI pool. Help everyone generate better ideas!
voteForMe.voteCta: Vote for Us on CyOps Arena

ship-a-feature.title: Ship-a-Feature
ship-a-feature.blurb: Close a real GitHub issue with a working PR that maintainers would actually want to merge.

mcp-server.title: MCP Server Sprint
mcp-server.blurb: Build a useful MCP server for real developer workflows, tools, or reusable primitives.

whole-repo-refactor.title: Whole-Repo Refactor
whole-repo-refactor.blurb: Modernize, migrate, or clean up a real codebase with measurable before / after improvements.

resurrection.title: The Resurrection
resurrection.blurb: Revive an abandoned, broken, or half-finished project and make it work again.
